      "text": "Bet preezajeetees un lihg-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es preezaschohe pahr

pahr manneem Laudim/ un eekſch
tahs ne tapſ wairs dsirdeta kah-
da Raudafchanas Balfs / jeb

"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tur ne buhs wairs Behr-

ſints Gaddus wez buhdams no-

ſints Gaddus wez buhdams/
taps nolahdehts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee uſtaifihſ Nam-
mus/un dſihwohs (eekſch teem/)

Augtus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee ne uſtaifihſ/ ka zits

ſtihs/ ka zits to ehd. Jo man-
nu Lauschu Deenas irr ka tahs
Deenas weena Kohka / un man-
ni Iſwehletee darrihs farvu Roh-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee ne strahdahs welti/

nus. Jo tee irr tas Dſimmums

Reem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas notiks/ virnis t

wehl runna/ tad es klaufſichu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wilki un Jehri gannil

ti buhs tahs Tſchuhſkas Barr
ba/ tee ue darrihs Lauwa/ ned
maitahs us wiſfu mannu fwe
tu Ratnu/ fakta tas KUNGS
"

    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta LXVI. Nodalla.

ka winsch tohs no winnu-Eenaidneefeem i
glahbt: 5/15. Teem Paganeem fawu Ea

Preesterus un Lewitus darriht: 11. Un
wenu muhschigu Duſſeſchannu pee teem Ca

"

"

    {
